content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于4月3日16:30(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年4月18日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【更新内容】
一、问题修复
● 修复了在部分地区夏令时切换时，某些情况下可能出现的以下问题：
    ○ 每日首次登录时，活动介绍信息未能正常弹出。
    ○ 「常训任务」界面显示错误，无法领取奖励。
    ○ 剧情中勾选「今日不再提示」后，选择跳过剧情不生效。

**V2.4.3.6 Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on April 3 at 16:30(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
  
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on April 18, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
  
[Update Content]
1. Bug Fixes
● Fixed an issue that could occur in certain situations during Daylight Saving Time transitions in some regions:
    ○  Fixed an issue where the event introduction pop-up failed to appear on the first daily login.
    ○  "Training Tasks" interface display error, unable to claim rewards.
    ○  In Story, after checking "Don't show again today," selecting skip Story does not take effect.
